## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] TypeScript compiles with no errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test` in each affected service)
- [ ] New/changed functionality has test coverage
- [ ] Database schema changes include a TypeORM migration with a working `down()`
- [ ] New environment variables are added to `.env.example` with documentation comments
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in Swagger decorators
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values are committed
